home.positioning: This is not a CV analysis. It's a candidate intelligence layer built to reduce uncertainty before you invest time.

steps.step1Desc: PDF or plain text. Parsed entirely in your browser — never uploaded to our servers.
steps.step2Desc: We search the web for company signals, press coverage, and funding information.
steps.step3Desc: Hypotheses, unknowns, and targeted interview questions ready in under 30 seconds.

header.title: External Insights Only
header.subtitle: This analysis highlights external signals not visible in the CV. No CV content is repeated.

sections.externalValidationSub: What public sources confirm about this candidate
sections.missingSignalsSub: Expected external presence that was not found
sections.nonObviousSub: Signals only visible when combining CV context with external data
sections.requiresValidationSub: Cannot be confirmed from CV or external data
sections.marketPerceptionSub: How this profile is likely perceived externally

report.noVerifiedSignals: No signals could be verified from external sources.
report.gdpr: We do not store your data. CVs are processed in-memory only. Profile enrichment uses publicly available web data. GDPR compliant.

fit.title:
Know If This Candidate
Is Worth the Interview
fit.subtitle: Instantly assess how well a profile matches your role — with deep analysis of alignment, gaps, and external signals that impact hiring decisions.
fit.jdPlaceholder:
Paste the full job description here…

Include: role title, responsibilities, requirements, and seniority signals.
fit.urlNote: We'll fetch and extract the job description automatically.

fit.blockedTitle: 🚫 This job board blocks automated access
fit.blockedMessage: Please open the job posting, copy the full description, and paste it in the text field above.
